title: Linde Starts Up Supply to World's First Hydrogen Ferry
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / March 31, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN) announced today that it has begun the supply of liquid hydrogen to the world's first operational hydrogen-powered ferry for cars and passengers in Norway. Linde is supplying ferry operator Norled with clean hydrogen for the fuel-cell powered MF Hydra.

title: S&P Global Includes Linde in The Sustainability Yearbook for 20th Consecutive Year
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / March 14, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN) announced today it has been included in S&P Global's Sustainability Yearbook 2023, its 20th consecutive year of inclusion. The Sustainability Yearbook recognizes the world's leading companies for sustainable business practices.

title: Linde plc: Linde Completes Delisting from Frankfurt Stock Exchange
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / March 1, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN) announced today that it has completed its intercompany reorganization resulting in the delisting of its shares from the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. As of March 2, 2023, the new holding company, "Linde plc", will be listed solely on the New York Stock Exchange and trade under the existing ticker "LIN".
